title: Fastenal: Good Growth Prospects But Expensive
text: The healthy demand from the capital goods market and the commodity-related market should support the near-term growth of the company. The company's long-term growth prospects look good with the opening of onsite locations and the installation of FMIs.

title: Why Is Fastenal (FAST) Up 15.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Fastenal (FAST) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: The 7 Best Stocks to Buy for August 2022
text: Coming off its best month since November 2020, it will be tough for the S&P 500 in August to match the 9.1% return it notched in July. The best stocks to buy in August may be some of the best performers from July.

title: 7 Stocks Under $50 to Buy and Hold Forever
text: It's important to have a diversified portfolio. You'll see that my portfolios run the gamut — there are large-cap names, growth stocks and momentum plays, but you'll also find some lesser known stocks under $50 to buy and hold.
